content: 2 This is in contrast to later Paralympics that include events for participants that fit into any of five different disability categories ; amputation , either congenital or sustained through injury or illness; cerebral palsy ; wheelchair athletes; visual impairment , including blindness ; Les autres, any physical disability that does not fall strictly under one of the other categories, for example dwarfism or multiple sclerosis
